products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Product master data — used for automatic linking during data import
products.guide: By creating products here, Retreat App will automatically link imported sales and purchases to the corresponding products, calculating margins and per-product performance.
products.empty_desc: Add your products to enable automatic linking during import.
products.name: Name

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Customer master data — used for automatic linking during data import
customers.guide: By creating customers here, Retreat App will automatically link imported sales to the corresponding customers, calculating LTV, segmentation and churn risk.
customers.empty_desc: Add your customers to enable automatic linking during import.
customers.name: Name

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Supplier master data — used for automatic linking during data import
suppliers.guide: By creating suppliers here, Retreat App will automatically link imported expenses and purchases to the corresponding suppliers.
suppliers.empty_desc: Add your suppliers to enable automatic linking during import.
suppliers.name: Name
